rdf:Description.dc:description: Computational workflow of the Op³ framework as described in manuscript Section 2.1: Inputs → Phase 1 (OptumGX 3D-FE) → Phase 2 (Python parameter extraction) → Phase 3 (OpenSeesPy structural dynamics) → Outputs, with validation loops against centrifuge tests and Gunsan field monitoring. Replaces the current figures_final2/Fig_01_Workflow_v1.png.
